name: jdy_batch_create_data
description_zh: 批量向表单新建多条记录（最多100条/次）
description: Batch create up to 100 data records in a form at once. 'data_list' is an array of data objects, each using the same format as single create: {"_widget_xxx":{"value":...}}. Returns success_ids[] of created records. Use is_start_workflow=true for workflow forms. transaction_id (UUID) required when records include file/image fields. Rate limit: 30/s.

is_start_trigger.description: 是否触发智能助手（默认false）
